## Problem

What problem should this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Types/domain model
- [ ] Planner
- [ ] Execution engine
- [ ] Registry
- [ ] Memory
- [ ] Tool authoring
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

For major architectural changes, please start discussion before implementation.
